changes: Add content_requirement_guard middleware to prompt agent to probe content/data requirements by mid-interview
Register content_requirement_guard in code_agent.yaml middleware list
Add category-coverage schedule to system prompt ensuring interaction, content, and style are all probed within first 6 turns
evolver_rationale: Missed content is the dominant failure mode (11/17 failure tags, content coverage only 0.476). The style_requirement_guard already proved effective (7 successful triggers), so mirroring it for content addresses the biggest gap. Adding a coverage schedule to the system prompt combats detail rabbit holes (8 instances) and ensures all three categories are probed early, improving approx_ESR (currently 0.17).
